list.name: Changes
list.comment:
Add Java classes for triangle calculations and grade reporting
- Implemented Triangle class for handling triangle-related operations. - Added ass3_01 class for a number guessing game with user input. - Created ass3_02 class to calculate and display grades based on user input. - Developed ass3_03 class for tax calculations with formatted output. - Introduced user-friendly menus and input prompts across all classes. - Ensured proper handling of user input and output formatting.

task.summary:
Add Java classes for triangle calculations and grade reporting
- Implemented Triangle class for handling triangle-related operations. - Added ass3_01 class for a number guessing game with user input. - Created ass3_02 class to calculate and display grades based on user input. - Developed ass3_03 class for tax calculations with formatted output. - Introduced user-friendly menus and input prompts across all classes. - Ensured proper handling of user input and output formatting.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
Add Java classes for triangle calculations and grade reporting
- Implemented Triangle class for handling triangle-related operations. - Added ass3_01 class for a number guessing game with user input. - Created ass3_02 class to calculate and display grades based on user input. - Developed ass3_03 class for tax calculations with formatted output. - Introduced user-friendly menus and input prompts across all classes. - Ensured proper handling of user input and output formatting.
